steps.vulnerability_name: Enforce JWT algorithm allowlist in identity-service
steps.description: Use parserBuilder + parseClaimsJws and reject any JWT algorithm not explicitly allowlisted (HS512). This blocks alg=none and any unsupported algorithm.

steps.vulnerability_name: Reject non-HMAC and non-HS512 in community-service
steps.description: Harden jwt.Parse keyFunc to deny alg=none and any signing method except HMAC HS512.

steps.vulnerability_name: Pin accepted JWT algorithms in workshop-service
steps.description: Require algorithms=["HS512"] in jwt.decode so unsigned/none tokens are rejected by PyJWT.
steps.replace_code:
import jwt
from jwt.exceptions import InvalidAlgorithmError, InvalidTokenError

ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS = ["HS512"]

try:
    payload = jwt.decode(
        token,
        settings.JWT_SECRET,
        algorithms=ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS,
    )
except (InvalidAlgorithmError, InvalidTokenError) as e:
    raise AuthenticationFailed(f"Invalid token: {e}")

verification.description: Unsigned JWT (alg=none) must be rejected on identity endpoint
Unsigned JWT (alg=none) must be rejected on workshop endpoint
Unsigned JWT (alg=none) must be rejected on community endpoint
